messages_body_or_attachment_required.name: messages_body_or_attachment_required
messages_body_or_attachment_required.value: "messages"."body" IS NOT NULL OR "messages"."attachment_file_id" IS NOT NULL

rfqs_budget_range.name: rfqs_budget_range
rfqs_budget_range.value: "rfqs"."budget_min_cents" IS NULL OR "rfqs"."budget_max_cents" IS NULL OR "rfqs"."budget_min_cents" <= "rfqs"."budget_max_cents"

vendor_menu_packages_guest_range.name: vendor_menu_packages_guest_range
vendor_menu_packages_guest_range.value: "vendor_menu_packages"."minimum_guest_count" IS NULL OR "vendor_menu_packages"."maximum_guest_count" IS NULL OR "vendor_menu_packages"."minimum_guest_count" <= "vendor_menu_packages"."maximum_guest_count"

vendor_menus_guest_range.name: vendor_menus_guest_range
vendor_menus_guest_range.value: "vendor_menus"."minimum_guest_count" IS NULL OR "vendor_menus"."maximum_guest_count" IS NULL OR "vendor_menus"."minimum_guest_count" <= "vendor_menus"."maximum_guest_count"

vendor_menus_seasonal_date_range.name: vendor_menus_seasonal_date_range
vendor_menus_seasonal_date_range.value: "vendor_menus"."seasonal_start_date" IS NULL OR "vendor_menus"."seasonal_end_date" IS NULL OR "vendor_menus"."seasonal_start_date" <= "vendor_menus"."seasonal_end_date"
